content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學預計於4月28日08:00~11:00（UTC+8）進行校內設施維護。
       維護結束後需要重新登入並進行更新，補給物資將會透過信件向守密人發送。若有任何疑問，歡迎通過校區內客服中心諮詢，感謝您的理解與支持！
  
【補給物資】
停服維護補償：銀芯×200、無垢之芯×5
 
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年5月12日09:00。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。

【更新內容】
一、活動
【黃金週特別活動：掃除奇旅】
● 活動「掃除奇旅」將於 4 月 28 日 9:00 - 5 月 12 日 9:00 開放！
    ○ 唰唰唰，唰唰唰，不知何處傳來了詭異的掃除聲……起早貪黑，夜以繼日，您忠心的小女僕珈倫正在盡心竭力地勞作，若是不跟上她的步伐的話，小心被那位大人盯上哦~
    ○ 活動期間，玩家完成每日掃除任務即可獲取
        ■ 每日登錄：累計登錄 7 天，即可領取 「無垢之芯」×10。
        ■ 夢境通風：完成任意難度「幻夢深潛」1次，可獲得「清掃工具」×300+「薔薇金券」×50000。
        ■ 回憶除塵：通關任意主線關卡任意難度 1 次，可獲得「清掃工具」×300+「薔薇金券」×50000。
        ■ 融蝕清理：在「融蝕之墟」中消耗 180 靈啡肽，可獲得「清掃工具」×200+「薔薇金券」×30000。
        ■ 維度消毒：進行一次「相位對弈」，可獲得「清掃工具」×300+「薔薇金券」×50000。
        ■ 背包整理：消耗  100000「薔薇金券」，可獲得「清掃工具」×200+「薔薇金券」×30000。
        ■ 今日掃除完成！：「清掃工具」×300+「薔薇金券」×50000。
● 累積清掃值即可領取對應獎勵，每達到 1000「清掃值」可領取豐厚的物資獎勵，累計達到 10000「清掃值」可獲得黃金週專屬頭像「清理大師」。
    ○ 活動物資獎勵至多可達 「銀芯」×1000，「無垢之芯」×10，「賢石碎屑」×240，「薔薇金券」×5140000。
 
【自選活動喚醒：久遠的呼喚】
● 在  4 月 28 日 9:00 - 5 月 12 日 9:00 期間，以下喚醒活動限時開放！
    ○ 自選活動喚醒「久遠的呼喚」：
        ■ 玩家可在以下喚醒體與對應推薦命輪中任選一組加入自選卡池。
            ● 莉莉、跨越疼痛；「24」、畸體回噬；萊克、好運時間；哈姆林、永恆安魂曲；塔薇、隱世的轉輪；圖魯、神王的頌歌；墨菲、隱秘的誕生；彌利亞姆、虔誠的偉力；索蕾爾、以薔薇之名；薩爾瓦多、神言石板；泰旖絲、慈悲的哺育；血鏈·希洛、沉入殷紅；達芙黛爾、至為珍貴的藏品；旺達、女王的戒律；奧爾拉、詩箋的句尾。
 
【角色活動：克珀珊特】
● 在 5 月 5 日 9:00 - 6 月 2 日 9:00 期間，以下喚醒活動限時開放！
    ○ 角色活動喚醒「天火領航」：深海界域防禦型喚醒體「克珀珊特」。
    ○ 命輪活動喚醒「溟海道標」：命輪「聖火中的指引」。
    ○ 試玩活動「冷光」：試用「克珀珊特」。可以領取「銀芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 玩法活動「於暴雨中搖曳」將於 5 月 5 日 9:00 - 5 月 26 日 9:00  開放！
    ○ 攻略活動將有機會獲得活動限定 SR 命輪「海上領航者」與活動限定頭像「以銀鑰之名：克珀珊特」。
    ○ 活動期間「航路秘寶」系列精選禮盒限時上架！

【意識潛游：克珀珊特】
● 「意識潛游」新增克珀珊特篇章「最後的引航」！
    ○ 這本該是一場充滿歡聲笑語的航行。豪華的遊輪，梭巡大西洋，載著勝利品，載著人們征服海洋的野望。
    ○ 但海洋有自己的脾氣。
● 通關後，即可解鎖全新鑰令「不滅的雷光」。
    ○ 鑰令效果：獲得 48 點護盾，抽 2 張牌。如果克珀珊特在隊伍中，還會將 1 張「領航」置入手中。
 
【活動復刻：血鏈·希洛】
● 在 5 月 19 日 9:00 - 6 月 16 日 9:00 期間，以下喚醒活動限時開放！
    ○ 角色活動喚醒復刻「復仇之獸」：血肉界域傷害型喚醒體「血鏈·希洛」。
    ○ 命輪活動喚醒復刻「紅雨傾盆」：命輪「沉入殷紅」。
    ○ 試玩活動復刻「索魂者」：試用「血鏈希洛」。完成每個試玩均可領取「銀芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 在 5 月 19 日 9:00 - 6 月 9 日 9:00  期間，「雪山消融之時」玩法活動復刻限時開放！
    ○ 攻略活動將有機會獲得活動限定 SR 命輪「待到雪山消融」與活動限定頭像「以銀鑰之名：血鏈·希洛」。
    ○ 活動期間「特遣紀錄：艾爾沃斯的歸人」免費解鎖開啟！
    ○ 活動期間「雪山種子」系列精選禮盒限時上架！
 
【學園活動：第十七期】
    ○ 在 5 月 5 日 9:00 - 6 月 2 日 9:00 期間，以下學園活動限時開放！
    ○ 第十七期「學園禮贈」
活動期間累計登錄 7 天即可領取「流明之芯」×10 的豐厚獎勵！
    ○ 第十七期「課題紀錄」
本期核心課題·限定頭像：「以銀鑰之名：漢娜」、「以銀鑰之名：法蘭西斯」。
本期核心課題·限定對戰表情：「輕鬆彌薩格：墨菲·好吃」、「快樂彌薩格：珈倫·心虛」、「校園生活篇：希萊斯特·對」、「快樂彌薩格：拉蒙娜·專業」。
    ○ 第十七賽季「於暴雨中搖曳」
本賽季·限定對戰表情：「校園生活篇：泰旖絲·偷笑」、「課餘時間篇：卡茜亞·喵」、「課餘時間篇：蘿坦·不錯」、「和平的一天：「24」·小丑」。
 
二、戰鬥
【喚醒體】
● 奧瑞塔
    ○ 靈知覺醒-自我增殖：會將 2 張「腺體分裂」置入手中。
    ○ 超限爆發-水母集合：還會獲得 24% 攻擊力的觸腕傷害。
    ○ 天賦：奧瑞塔每有 1 點狂氣回充等級，戰鬥開始時獲得攻擊力 1% 的觸腕傷害。
    ○ 啟靈 3-笑呵呵玩樂：額外添加「基礎防禦」抽 1 張牌的效果。
    ○ 靈塑適性：「喧囂海洋」每消耗 1 張「腺體分裂」，奧瑞塔本場戰鬥後續傷害提高 3%-8% 攻擊力。首領戰中若「喧囂海洋」至少消耗了 20 張「腺體分裂」，「腺體分裂」打出和被消耗時造成的傷害次數+1。
● 血鏈·希洛
    ○ 靈塑適性：「縛身鎖鏈」造成的傷害額外享受 100％~400％ 力量加成。
 
【其他】
● 「褪色遺骨」中的「安葬」選項調整為選擇最多 1 張指令卡刪除，在沒有需要刪除的指令卡時可以不進行選擇。
 
三、相位對弈
【奧吉爾】
戰鬥啟示：算力由 4 降低為 3。
 
【珊】
珊瑚螺旋：傷害由 6 降低為 5。
無盡的雕琢：新增若回合結束時在手中，將其棄掉並獲得 8 點護盾。
 
【命輪】
● 冒險的行囊：算力消耗由 1 提高為 2。若目標未裝備命輪，會返還消耗的算力。
● 珊瑚女之死：出血傷害由 9 降低為 6。裝備者死亡時對全體敵方額外造成 9 點出血傷害。
● 永恆安魂曲：現在遲緩會在狂氣爆發生效前施加。
● 臨界點：回合結束時不再獲得蓄力，算力消耗由 4 降低為 2。
● 聚首時刻：額外使手牌上限 +1。    
● 真理之門：算力消耗由 1 提高為 2。
● 職責所在：狂氣由 20 提高為 25。
● 好運時間：算力消耗由 2 提高為 3。
● 百萬蒙寵之眼：算力消耗由 2 提高為 3。

四、最佳化和問題修復
● 將所有喚醒體中棄掉後觸發的效果統一為「餘波」詞綴。
● 現在可以在「冶煉室」將 1 個「群星餘夢」置換為 3 個「碎裂餘夢」。
● 最佳化了「編隊」界面的關卡類型文本描述。
● 更新了「傷害強效」的圖示，和「相位對弈」中統一。
● 增加了「麻痺」、「纏繞」的圖示視覺 效果。
● 修復了造物「苦痛聖腕」和「怒濤」形態一起使用時，結算效果不正確的問題
● 修復了使用「巢群捕食」後，會導致「宇宙▲▲投影」錯誤每回合獲得 50 強化的問題。 
● 修復了星辰篇主線劇情2-4「追捕」錯誤的文本描述。
● 修復了 24 混沌界域試玩中靈知覺醒不生效的問題。
● 修復了熔毀·朵爾靈知覺醒中，靈知覺醒詞綴遺失的問題。
● 修復了相位對弈中「牧羊人的手杖」在被纏繞後，治療加成或是傷害加成會永久存在的問題。
● 修復了相位對弈中「酒館之門」未解鎖時，名稱顯示錯誤的問題。
● 修復了相位對弈中「珊瑚螺旋」偶爾會回復生命的問題。
● 修復了相位對弈中「暗流微光」抽牌堆為空時會無效的問題。
● 修復了相位對弈中護盾翻倍、傷害轉護盾、傷害轉回復受到各類加成或減益後，效果不一致的問題。
● 修復了「課題記錄」切換下一期時，獎勵領取狀態沒有刷新的問題。
● 修復了玩家名字帶有符號"|"時顯示異常的問題。
● 最佳化了喚醒體檔案界面中，基礎資訊的顯示效果。
● 最佳化了喚醒體啟靈界面，超限狂氣爆發文本的顯示效果。
● 最佳化了劇情對話台詞文本的表現。

2.2.1.0 Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    Mythag University will undergo facility maintenance on April 28 from 08:00 to 11:00 (UTC+8).
    After maintenance, you will need to log in again and update resources. Supplies will be sent via mail. For any questions, please contact the campus customer service center. Thank you for your understanding and support!

【Supplies】
Maintenance Compensation:  Silver×200, Pure Core×5

【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on May 12, 2025, at 09:00. Please remember to collect your supplies from the mailbox in time.

【Update Content】
I. Events
【Golden Week Special Event: Cleaning Journey】
● Event "Cleaning Journey" will be available from April 28, 9:00 to May 12, 9:00!
    ○ Swish, swish, swish, where is that strange cleaning sound coming from... Day and night, your loyal maid Karen is working tirelessly. Keep up with her pace, or you might catch the attention of the master~
    ○ During the event, players can complete daily cleaning tasks to earn rewards:
        ■ Daily Login: Log in for 7 days to receive "Pure Core" ×10.
        ■ Dream Ventilation: Complete any difficulty "Deep Dream Dive" once to get "Cleaning Tool" ×300 + "Golden Rose" ×50000.
        ■ Memory Dusting: Clear any mainline stage at any difficulty once to get "Cleaning Tool" ×300 + "Golden Rose" ×50000.
        ■ Corrosion Cleaning: Spend 180 Menophin in "Corroded Ruins" to get "Cleaning Tool" ×200 + "Golden Rose" ×30000.
        ■ Dimensional Disinfection: Perform "Traphase" once to get "Cleaning Tool" ×300 + "Golden Rose" ×50000.
        ■ Backpack Sorting: Spend 100000 "Golden Rose" to get "Cleaning Tool" ×200 + "Golden Rose" ×30000.
        ■ Today's Cleaning Complete!: "Cleaning Tool" ×300 + "Golden Rose" ×50000.

● Accumulate cleaning points to claim corresponding rewards. Every 1000 "Cleaning Points" grants generous inventory rewards, and reaching 10000 "Cleaning Points" earns the exclusive Golden Week avatar "Cleaning Master".
    ○ Event inventory rewards can reach up to "Silver" ×1000, "Pure Core" ×10, "Sage Stone Fragment" ×240, "Golden Rose" ×5140000.

【Awakening Event Selection: The Distant Call】
● From April 28, 9:00 to May 12, 9:00, the following awakening events are open for a limited time!
    ○ Awakening Event Selection "The Distant Call":
        ■ Players can choose one group from the following Awakers and their recommended Wheel of Destiny to join the selection pool.
 ● Lily, Beyond Pain; "24", Aberrant Recoil; Ryker, Lucky Time; Hameln, Eternal Requiem; Tawil, Hidden Wheel; Tulu, Song of the God-King; Murphy, Secret Birth; Miryam, Power of the Pious; Sorel, In the Name of the Rose; Salvador, Tablet of the Divine; Thais, Merciful Nurture; Helot-Catena, Sinking into Crimson; Daffodil, Most Precious Collection; Wanda, Queen's Edict; Horla, End of the Verse.

【Character Event: Copperchant】
● From May 5, 9:00 to June 2, 9:00, the following awakening events are open for a limited time!
    ○ Character Awakening Event "Heavenly Fire Guide": Deep Sea Realm assist-type Awaker "Copperchant".
    ○ Wheel of Destiny Awakening Event "Abyssal Beacon": Wheel of Destiny "Guidance in the Sacred Fire".
    ○ Trial Event "Cold Light": Try "Copperchant". Receive "Silver" ×40, "Lumen Core" ×1.
● Gameplay Event "Swaying in the Storm" will be available from May 5, 9:00 to May 26, 9:00!
    ○ Strategy event offers a chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "Navigator of the Sea" and event-exclusive avatar "In the Name of the Silver Key: Copperchant".
    ○ During the event, the "Treasure of the Sea Route" series of selected gift boxes will be available for a limited time!

【The Wandering: Copperchant】
● "The Wandering" adds a new chapter for Copperchant "The Last Guide"!
    ○ This was supposed to be a voyage filled with laughter. A luxurious cruise, traversing the Atlantic, carrying trophies and the ambition to conquer the sea.
    ○ But the ocean has its own temperament.
● Upon completion, unlock the new Posse "Unyielding Thunderlight".
    ○ Posse Effect: Gain 48 Shield, draw 2 cards. If Copperchant is in the team, add 1 "Guide" to your hand.

【Event Re-run: Helot-Catena】
● From May 19, 9:00 to June 16, 9:00, the following awakening events are open for a limited time!
    ○ Character Awakening Event Re-run "Beast of Vengeance": Caro Realm damage-type Awaker "Helot-Catena".
    ○ Wheel of Destiny Awakening Event Re-run "Crimson Downpour": Wheel of Destiny "Sinking into Crimson".
    ○ Trial Event Re-run "Soul Seeker": Try "Helot-Catena". Complete each trial to receive "Silver" *40, "Lumen Core" *1.
● From May 19, 9:00 to June 9, 9:00, the "When the Snow Melts" gameplay event re-run is open for a limited time!
    ○ Strategy event offers a chance to obtain the event-exclusive SR Wheel of Destiny "When the Snow Melts" and event-exclusive avatar "In the Name of the Silver Key: Helot-Catena".
    ○ During the event, "Special Operation: Elworth's Return" is unlocked for free!
    ○ During the event, the "Snow Mountain Seed" series of selected gift boxes will be available for a limited time!

【Academy Event: Seventeenth Term】
    ○ From May 5, 9:00 to June 2, 9:00, the following academy events are open for a limited time!
    ○ Seventeenth Term "Academy Gift"
During the event, log in for 7 days to receive the generous reward of "Lumen Core" ×10!
    ○ Seventeenth Term "Assignment Record"
This term's core assignment·limited avatar: "In the Name of the Silver Key: Hannah", "In the Name of the Silver Key: Francis".
This term's core assignment·limited battle expression: "Easy Mythag: Murphy·Delicious", "Happy Mythag: Karen·Guilty", "Campus Life: Celeste·Yes", "Happy Mythag: Ramona·Professional".
    ○ Seventeenth Season "Swaying in the Storm"
This season's·limited battle expression: "Campus Life: Thais·Sneak", "After School: Casiah·Meow", "After School: Lotan·Nice", "A Peaceful Day: '24'·Clown".

II. Battle
【Awakers】
● Aurita
    ○ Rouse - Self-Replication: Adds 2 "Gland Split" to your hand.
    ○ Over-Exaltation - Jellyfish Assembly: Gains 24% attack power as tentacle damage.
    ○ Talent: Aurita gains 1% attack power as tentacle damage for each level of Aliemus recharge at the start of battle.
    ○ Enlighten 3 - Let's Have Fun: Adds an effect to draw 1 card with "Basic Defence".
    ○ Gnosis Adaptation: "Clamorous Ocean" increases subsequent damage by 3%-8% attack power for each "Gland Split" consumed. In boss battles, if "Clamorous Ocean" consumes at least 20 "Gland Split", the damage instances of "Gland Split" played and consumed are increased by 1.
● Helot-Catena
    ○ Gnosis Adaptation: Damage from "Binding Chains" benefits from an additional 100%-400% power bonus.

【Others】
● The "Bury" option in "Faded Bones" is adjusted to allow the deletion of up to 1 command card, with no selection needed if no command card is to be deleted.

III. Traphase
【Ogier】
Battle Insight: Arithmetica reduced from 4 to 3.

【Sanga】
Coral Spiral: Damage reduced from 6 to 5.
Endless Carving: New effect to discard it at the end of the turn and gain 8 Shield.

【Wheel of Destiny】
● Adventurer's Bag: Arithmetica cost increased from 1 to 2. If the target is not equipped with a Wheel of Destiny, the Arithmetica cost is refunded.
● Death of Ms. Coral: Bleed damage reduced from 9 to 6. Upon the wearer's death, deals an additional 9 bleed damage to all enemies.
● Eternal Requiem: Delay now applies before Aliemus exaltation takes effect.
● Critical Point: No longer gains Charged at the end of the turn, Arithmetica cost reduced from 4 to 2.
● Gathering Moment: Increases hand limit by 1.
● Gate of Truth: Arithmetica cost increased from 1 to 2.
● Duty Calls: Aliemus increased from 20 to 25.
● Lucky Time: Arithmetica cost increased from 2 to 3.
● Million Loving Gaze: Arithmetica cost increased from 2 to 3.

IV. Optimization and Bug Fixes
● Unified the effects triggered upon discarding in all Awakers as the "Aftershock" suffix.
● You can now exchange 1 "Dream of the Stars" for 3 "Shattered Dreams" in the "Alchemy".
● Optimized the stage type text description in the "Team Lineup" interface.
● Updated the icon for "Damage Amplification" to match that in "Traphase".
● Added visual effects for the icons of "Paralysis" and "Entangle".
● Fixed the issue where the effects of using the relic "Painful Holy Arm" and "Raging Waves" together were incorrect.
● Fixed the issue where using "Swarm Prey" caused "Cosmic ▲▲ Projection" to incorrectly gain 50 Fortify each turn.
● Fixed the incorrect text description in the main storyline 2-4 "Pursuit" of the Star Chapter.
● Fixed the issue where Rouse was ineffective in the 24 Chaos Realm trial.
● Fixed the issue where the Rouse suffix was missing in the Molten Doll Rouse.
● Fixed the issue in Traphase where the "Shepherd's Staff" would permanently retain healing or damage bonuses after being entangled.
● Fixed the issue where the name displayed incorrectly when the "Tavern Door" was not unlocked in Traphase.
● Fixed the issue where "Coral Spiral" occasionally restored health in Traphase.
● Fixed the issue where "Dark Current Glimmer" was ineffective when the draw pile was empty in Traphase.
● Fixed the issue where shield doubling, damage to shield, and damage to healing effects were inconsistent after receiving various bonuses or penalties in Traphase.
● Fixed the issue where the reward claim status did not refresh when switching to the next term in "Assignment Record".
● Fixed the issue where player names with the symbol "|" displayed abnormally.
● Optimized the display effect of basic information in the Awaker archive interface.
● Optimized the display effect of the Over-Exaltation text in the Awaker Enlighten interface.
● Optimized the performance of dialogue text in the storyline.
衍伸牌：領航
【自選活動喚醒：久遠的呼喚】選定之後是否就不能更改了?  還是可以抽完角色後隨時更改?
為什麼寫兩次久遠的呼喚
回声，兄弟，呼唤是有回声的
“「以銀鑰之名：法蘭西斯」”
小水母好像可以用了欸
因為兩次的打字時間比一次久遠
「領航」置入手中……
什麼卡手界域
三張聖禮+三張巨刃+n張領航
血希都這麼強了
還加強喔
其他角色勒
